remarks: LOCATION, LOCATION, LOCATION! Welcome to this beautifully updated, move-in-ready end-unit condominium in the highly desirable Fountain Terrace community. This bright and spacious 1-bedroom, 1-bath home features an open-concept floor plan, brand-new carpeting, abundant natural light, and a generously sized bedroom with exceptional closet space. The sun-filled living room opens to a private corner balcony, perfect for enjoying your morning coffee or relaxing with beautiful city views.  Enjoy an exceptional lifestyle with resort-style amenities, including 24-hour security, an indoor pool, fitness center, laundry facilities, playground, bike storage, extra storage, and assigned parking. The HOA includes heat, hot water, gas, basic cable, and one assigned parking space, offering outstanding value and worry-free living.  Ideally located just minutes from Downtown Stamford, Metro-North, I-95, shopping, restaurants, cafes, entertainment, Stamford Town Center, parks, the hospital, library, and more. Whether you're a first-time homebuyer, downsizing, or looking for a smart investment (some restrictions apply) this home offers comfort, convenience, and an unbeatable location. Don't miss this opportunity to own one of the best values in Stamford-schedule your private showing today!
